title: PanelProvenance
description: Provenance for theme/topic/point pages derived from Panel Talk seeds. See EDITORIAL_ROOM_CONTRACT.md §3.9.2. NOTE: §10 of the contract does not list this schema explicitly but §3.9.2 defines the shape and the page schemas reference it; we ship it as a sibling of pcp_provenance to mirror the pattern.

source_skill.description: Typically 'factory_panel_dialectic' or factory_*_optimize when invoked with panel_seed.

source_panel_id.description: The Panel Talk panel that produced the seeds.

seed_summary.description: Summary of what was promoted (synthesis text, talking-point claim, or dialectic new_question). Raw turn content lives in clawrocket panel storage.
